title: Maine Judicial Branch News & Announcements
description: General Judicial Branch newsroom — a date-prefixed list of announcement links (new courthouses, eCourts rollout, bar-exam and administrative news), broader than the eFiling-specific jb-efiling-notices and the closure-focused jb-court-alerts. Same 'ul.newslist li' structure as jb-efiling-notices.
